description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical black can with a metallic top and pull-tab opening, resembling an energy drink or soda can. The can features a large, stylized gold graphic of a mechanical robot or exosuit, which wraps around the body of the can. Prominent gold text is partially visible, with the words 'PUNK' and 'DRAFT' discernible across different sides. The surface of the can is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The top is silver and slightly domed, with a standard pull-tab for opening. No visible nutritional labeling or brand logos are present, and the can's design is bold and modern, likely appealing to a youthful, urban audience.
description: A tall, black can with a glossy finish, featuring gold robotic graphics and bold text, topped with a metallic pull-tab. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible branding or nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold robot graphic and the word 'PUNK' prominently on the black can.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the continuation of the gold text, with 'NK' visible and less of the robot graphic.
description_view_2: Opposite side displays the word 'DRAFT' in gold, with minimal robot graphic visible.
description_view_3: Back view shows another angle of the gold robot graphic and partial text, with the pull-tab visible on top.
